zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Heton於1337年4月出生在英國諾圖波藍德林加姆時，她的父親Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham22歲，母親Lady Constance De Leybourne17歲。她於大約1358年與John Fenwick在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1410年6月24日享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Heton于1337年4月出生在英国諾圖波藍德林加姆时，她的父亲Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham22岁，母亲Lady Constance De Leybourne17岁。她于大约1358年与John Fenwick在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1410年6月24日享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Heton was born in April 1337, in Chillingham, Northumberland, England, her father, Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham, was 22 and her mother, Lady Constance De Leybourne, was 17. She married John Fenwick about 1358, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 24 June 1410, at the age of 73.

Elle a épousé John Fenwick environ 1358, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 juin 1410, à l’âge de 73 ans.

Lei sposato John Fenwick circa 1358, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 giugno 1410, all'età di 73 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Heton(이)가 1337년 4월 영국 노르스벌랜드 치링함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Constance De Leybourne(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 John Fenwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 6월 24일 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Heton родилась апрель 1337 г. в местности чиллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Constance De Leybourne, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Fenwick около 1358 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 24 июня 1410 г. в возрасте 73 лет.
